explanation: Fetches a paginated list of conversations from the API. The page number is passed as a query parameter and the returned items array is extracted from the response payload.
FastAPI endpoint that deletes a workspace by ID. It looks up the workspace, deletes it if present, commits the transaction, and returns a simple status payload.
React hook for authentication. Manages user state and provides a login function that calls the API, stores the user in state, and saves the JWT token to localStorage for subsequent requests.
Service class for bill-related operations. Provides a search method that performs case-insensitive search on bill titles using SQLAlchemy's ilike operator. Returns up to 'limit' matching bills.

WebSocket handler in Go. Upgrades HTTP connection to WebSocket, then enters a read loop. Messages received are sent to a broadcast channel for distribution to other clients. Connection cleanup happens automatically via defer.

SwiftUI View extension that adds a card-style modifier. Applies padding, system background color, rounded corners, and subtle shadow. Can be chained onto any View with .card() for consistent card styling.
Jetpack Compose card component for displaying bill information. Renders a Material 3 Card with click handler, showing the bill title and status. Uses Material theming for consistent styling.

Decorator that adds exponential backoff retry logic to async functions. Retries up to max_retries times, with increasing delays (1s, 2s, 4s). Re-raises the exception if all retries fail. Useful for unreliable network calls.
Simple utility that compares two strings after trimming whitespace. Returns True when the content meaningfully changed and False when only surrounding whitespace differs.
Formats a kebab-case workspace name into title case by replacing hyphens with spaces and capitalizing each word. Useful for display labels.
